title: Maps, Strings, Bytes, Runes, Unicode, and Deterministic Results · Runtime Contract: Map Key Alias Concurrency
summary: An incident summarizer must count labels, normalize text, preserve UTF-8, and publish stable output despite unordered maps. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go map key alias concurrency increment in a Unicode-safe deterministic incident summarizer. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose comparable key types and explain map reference behavior, iteration instability, mutation rules, and concurrency limits.
Create, update, delete, clear, and query maps while distinguishing missing keys from stored zero values.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
